game_name: Disney's Magical Quest 3 Starring Mickey & Donald

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary combat and puzzle-solving mechanic in default outfit

element_introduction_order.element: Magician outfit (magic blasts, underwater breathing, magic carpet control)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First special ability outfit; magic meter management introduced
Resource management system tied to ranged combat

element_introduction_order.element: Firefighter uniform (water spray, fire extinguishing, block pushing, ice formation)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Second outfit; expands environmental interaction possibilities

element_introduction_order.element: Water meter and fire hydrant collection
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Second resource meter; parallels magic meter system

element_introduction_order.element: Mountain-climbing gear (grappling hook, vertical traversal, item grabbing)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Third outfit; introduces vertical space exploration
Economy system for item purchases and upgrades

typical_relief_triggers: Acquiring new outfit with distinct advantage
typical_tension_triggers: Introduction of new outfit requirement for progression
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Graduated difficulty with outfit-gated progression; tension builds through level-by-level introduction of new mechanics and environmental hazards; relief cycles tied to outfit acquisition and resource collection

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Shops scattered throughout levels; purchasable upgrades indicate optional depth

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational mechanics introduced gently; basic platforming and block-throwing in Level 1 with minimal enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Outfit introduction accelerates (magician in Level 2, firefighter in Level 3); environmental puzzle complexity increases; resource management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Grappling hook in Level 4 enables vertical exploration; prior outfit mastery required for progression; boss encounters intensify
notable_spikes: Level 2 transition: first special ability and magic meter management
Level 3: firefighter outfit required for environmental obstacles (fires, block manipulation)
Level 4: grappling hook introduction adds vertical dimension and traversal complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major level (2-4) grants a new outfit that unlocks previously inaccessible areas and abilities. Level design appears structured to require the new outfit for progression, creating natural gates and pacing checkpoints.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 3 (firefighter uniform required to extinguish fires and progress)

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels contain scattered coins, hearts, and outfit-specific resources (magic lamps, fire hydrants). Collection cycles provide relief moments and reward exploration, with shops offering upgrades as long-term progression hooks.
New hazards (fires, underwater sections, vertical cliffs) appear first in controlled contexts before being combined with enemy encounters and platforming challenges.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 2-4 introduce hazards matching new outfit capabilities

sources_used: wikipedia: Disney's Magical Quest series article (Magical Quest 3 section)
